title: Facility Authority
description: Recognized broadcast regulatory authorities for use as prefixes in facility_id identifier values. The facility_id format is authority:id (e.g., fcc:73953).

enumDescriptions.arcom: Autorité de régulation de la communication audiovisuelle et numérique (France)
enumDescriptions.mic: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (Japan)
enumDescriptions.msit: Ministry of Science and ICT (South Korea)
